show-inputs-ingame.name: Show Inputs In-Game
show-inputs-ingame.description: Show input bars when playing a level with a matching JSON replay.

bar-height.name: Bar Height
bar-height.description: Height of the input bars in pixels.

bar-y-position.name: Bar Y Position
bar-y-position.description: Vertical position of the bars from the bottom of the screen.

indicator-color.name: Indicator Color
indicator-color.description: Color for the player position indicator outline.

background-color.name: Background Color
background-color.description: Color for the background strip behind the input bars.

accent-color.name: Accent Color
accent-color.description: Accent color for the mod UI.
